commit.message:
Add full finance toolkit — 7 tools in one app

- app.py: home page with tool overview
- pages/1: 5-Year Financial Model (moved from root)
- pages/2: Annual Budget (existing)
- pages/3: Lending Calculator (loan + mortgage with early repayment)
- pages/4: Portfolio Analysis (Sharpe, VaR, risk/return scatter)
- pages/5: Stock Comparison (2 stocks, correlation, ratios)
- pages/6: Commodities Dashboard (gold, silver, oil, gas, copper, wheat)

All charts rebuilt in Plotly. Consistent styling across all pages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: reduce timeouts to eliminate screenshot hang

- waitForSelector: 8000ms → 3000ms (non-throwing, warns and continues)
- waitNetworkIdle: 8000ms → 5000ms fallback
- expandMenu/switchView element checks: 2000ms → 1000ms
- Per-screenshot hard cap: 30s Promise.race to prevent indefinite hang

Root cause: Vision AI generates waitForSelector for popups that need
to be triggered first — element never appears, costs 8s per timeout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: infinite reload loop on session expiry

The 401 handler was clearing wrong localStorage keys (token/user)
while Zustand persists auth under "digital-fte-auth". After redirect
to /, Zustand rehydrated the stale token, fired another API call,
got 401 again, and looped. Now clears the correct persist key and
uses a sessionStorage guard to prevent repeated redirects.

fix: UX and visual polish across landing and task manager

SVGs:

  cluster, and a list of generated tasks with check/pending states.
  Clearly communicates the AI planning flow instead of abstract circles

- Add a '?' link to #/tiers after the bars so users can discover what
  the bars represent without needing to hover for tooltips

Remove All Tasks button:
- Move out of the header row (away from Refresh) and into the view
  controls row as a de-emphasized text button; only visible when tasks
  exist. Eliminates the destructive/benign action pairing at equal weight

FAQ:

  improved readability on dark backgrounds

commit.message:
Add smart horizon fallback for missing forecast horizons

Fixed issue where requesting date ranges with missing horizons (e.g., 91 days
requires 180d but only 90d exists) would show no data.

Changes:
- Implemented horizon priority fallback system
- For 91-day requests: Try 180d → 90d → 30d
- For 365-day requests: Try 365d → 180d → 90d → 30d
- Date range filtering extracts requested days from available horizon
- Empty queryset returned only if NO horizons exist

Example:
- User requests: March 1 - May 31 (91 days)
- System tries: 180d (not found) → 90d (found!) ✅
- Filters 90d data to show all 90 days (close to requested 91)
- Result: User sees data instead of "No data available"

File Modified:
- dashboard/views.py (lines 1611-1638)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
fix: honest state machine — duplicate key = fetched, not failed

- Add get_content_by_url() to db.py for duplicate detection
- Fix process_single_url(): duplicate key → mark_url_fetched(), not mark_url_failed()
- Transient DB errors now leave URL as pending (retries) instead of failed
- Always coerce result.error to str (was dict, causing psycopg2 adapt errors)
- Fix outer exception handler: only genuine failures reach mark_url_failed()
- Status collector now warns on stuck unknown episodes (14+ days) and phantom failures (failed with no strategies tried)

One-time DB cleanup:
- Reset 1,449 dict-error real URLs → pending (code bug, not fetch failure)
- Deleted remaining health-check/SSRF/skip junk entries
- Reset 29 urlparse/PosixPath code-bug failures → pending
- Fixed 2 remaining duplicate-key failures → fetched

Result: 2,702 failed = all genuine "all strategies exhausted" failures
        1,450 pending = real articles queued for retry

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix database connection and add loading preloader for forecast generation

Fixed two critical issues preventing the forecasting dashboard from working properly:

Issue #1: Database Configuration
- Changed database name from 'dataSync' to 'db_dataSync' in settings.py
- Fixed hardcoded password to use environment variable: os.getenv('DB_PASSWORD')
- Verified MySQL connection working correctly with 6,475 forecast records

Issue #2: No User Feedback During Forecast Generation
- Added 'generating_forecasts' flag to detect when no data exists
- Created professional loading screen with:
  * Animated Bootstrap spinner (3rem size)
  * Clear messaging: "Generating Forecasts... This may take a few minutes"
  * Animated progress bar for visual feedback
  * AI icon with explanation text
- Added auto-refresh every 10 seconds to check for completion
- Preloader automatically disappears once data is available
- Empty state not cached to ensure fresh checks

Files Modified:
- saspulse/settings.py: Database configuration fix (lines 104, 106)
- dashboard/views.py: Added generation detection logic (lines 1798-1821)
- dashboard/templates/dashboard/sales_forecasting.html: Added loading UI (lines 191-219)

User Experience:
Before: "No data available" with no explanation
After: Professional loading screen with auto-refresh that shows progress

feat: add CrowdSec intrusion detection with Traefik ForwardAuth bouncer

- Agent reads Traefik pod logs via k8s API, traefik + http-cve collections
- ForwardAuth bouncer deployment checks client IPs against LAPI
- Bouncer API key pre-registered via LAPI env var, stored in SOPS secret
- CrowdSec middleware applied globally to websecure entrypoint
- Traefik access logs enabled (JSON format for CrowdSec parsing)

commit.message:
Add iPad-friendly Select mode toggle to DeepDiveTable

Adds an explicit "Select" toggle button (Option B / iOS Mail pattern).
When active, mouse drag-to-select and touch tap-to-select work;
when inactive, normal scroll/click behaviour is unaffected.
Clears selection on mode toggle-off.

fix: per-platform native install methods, not lowest common denominator

- README: CC marketplace + manual, Cursor manual, Other fallback
- SKILL.md 4b template: same per-platform install sections
- SKILL.md 4e: symlink as minimum + marketplace publishing as option
- templates.md: README template with per-platform install
- Each platform gets its best install experience, not a dumbed-down table

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: address 26 findings from log analysis (19 fixes, 7 dismissed) (#435)

* fix: address 19 findings from log analysis (2C, 6H, 7M, 4L)

Log analysis of a world build session (3,037 lines) identified 26 issues.
7 were dismissed as false positives or working-as-designed. This commit
addresses the remaining 19 actionable findings across 5 phases.

Phase 1 — Temporal Validation Hardening:
- C1/M9: Detect negative lifespans (death before birth) as ERROR
- M2: Log INFO when entities lack temporal data
- L2: Guard birth > death at character storage time

Phase 2 — VRAM Correctness:
- C2: Account for evictable models in VRAM budget via ollama ps()
- H2: Warn about self-judging bias when creator == judge

Phase 3 — UI Analysis Page:
- H1: Debounce timeline validation + liveness guard on refresh
- H3: Ensure accept-circular feedback shows before refresh
- M1: Skip redundant health dashboard rebuilds via metrics hash

Phase 4 — Quality Loop & Batch:
- H4: Deduplicate event existing descriptions
- H7: Skip hail-mary when model stuck on identical output
- H8: Wire up phased callables for character parallel batching
- M6: Show requested vs actual count in batch summary
- M7: Lower chapter quality threshold from 7.5 to 7.0

Phase 5 — Low-Impact & Configuration:
- M3: Filter empty world rules before embedding
- M5: Log embedding truncation details on first occurrence
- M8: Clear accepted cycles on world rebuild
- L1: Raise normalize_relation_type fallback log to INFO
- L4: Separate generation vs post-processing time logging
- L5: Limit relationship prompt context to 10 most recent

* fix: fix test failures from hail-mary identical-output skip

- Fix WorldHealthMetrics hash guard: use len(low_quality_entities)
  instead of non-existent low_quality_count attribute
- Update 5 quality loop tests to use varying refine_fn output,
  preventing false identical-output hail-mary skip

* fix: fix remaining test failures and add coverage tests

- Fix WorldHealthMetrics hash guard (low_quality_entities not count)
- Update quality loop tests for hail-mary identical-output skip
- Update relationship test for 10-pair prompt cap (L5)
- Add event description dedup test (H4 coverage)
- Add VRAM ps() loaded model query tests (C2 coverage)
- Add character phased callable tests (H8 coverage)

* test: add coverage tests for character phased callables in _batch.py

Cover the remaining uncovered lines (532-534, 538, 553-556) in the
character phased pipeline: _create_only error path, _is_empty_char,
and _refine_with_initial calling quality_refinement_loop.

* fix: address 19 PR review findings from local agents and external reviewers

- Critical: fix Settings._instance → Settings.load(use_cache=True) in _vram_budget.py
- Critical: fix health dashboard clearing container before hash check (blank UI on cache hit)
- Expand metrics hash to include entity IDs/scores, cycle edges, temporal counts
- Add evictable_vram_gb parameter to plan_vram_budget() and forward to pair_fits()
- Add missing return after "no lifecycle data" early exit in temporal validation
- Fix total_time calculation in _batch_parallel.py to include post-processing
- Replace silent except Exception: pass with debug logging in _quality_loop.py
- Fix misleading "Falling back to sequential" → "Falling back to non-phased generation"
- Add evictable/effective VRAM to fallback warning in _model_resolver.py
- Improve exception logging with exc_info=True across multiple modules
- Add missing docstrings flagged by interrogate
- Update tests: fix score plateau test, tighten hail-mary assertions, add fixtures

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: fix temporal validation early return that skipped type-specific warnings

Remove premature early return when lifecycle is None — entity-type validators
(location, item, faction, character) handle missing lifecycle by adding
MISSING_TEMPORAL_DATA warnings. The early return was skipping those validators.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
data: C2_LOG falsified — r=0.92 is monotonicity artifact (random sorted r=0.89)

The shuffle test shows: K_c correlates with ANY sorted sequence (r=0.89),
not specifically with zeta zeros. The correlation r=0.92 is not special.
51/99 sign changes at zeros = pure random.

The right question: is K_c special AT the zeros vs elsewhere?
Answer: no, with this setup.

The D-ND/zeta bridge operates at STATISTICAL level (spacing distribution,
beta=2.007 from Piano 11c) not at LOCAL level (pointwise K_c).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add structured JSONL logging and periodic reflection to PR Patrol (#1719)

* feat: add structured JSONL logging and periodic reflection to PR Patrol

- Log every PR fix result and cycle summary to ~/.cache/pr-patrol/runs.jsonl
  with structured fields (pr_num, issues, result, elapsed, cycle_number)
- Every 10 cycles, spawn a Claude reflection session that analyzes the last
  100 log entries for recurring patterns and optionally files a GitHub issue
- Reflection results logged separately to ~/.cache/pr-patrol/reflections.jsonl
- Fix summary truncation bug (tail -c 1500 | head -c 500 took a random
  middle slice, now uses tail -c 500 for the actual last 500 chars)
- Configurable via PR_PATROL_REFLECTION_INTERVAL env var (default: 10)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address CodeRabbit review feedback

- Validate REFLECTION_INTERVAL is a positive integer to prevent modulo-by-zero
  arithmetic errors in the reflection loop
- Filter empty strings from jq split(",") to avoid spurious [""] in JSONL logs

Display IaC commit URL in CLI during deploy

Constructs commit URLs from the IaC repo URL and commit SHA after
pushing to the IaC repo, and streams them to the CLI via SSE events.
The URL is shown after both successful and failed deployments.

commit.message:
feat: persistent model loading, TUI tool rendering overhaul and process viewer

- Load LLM model once at startup via Arc<LlmEngineHandle>, reused across
  all agent turns and subagents (no more per-call disk reloads)
- Tool rendering: blinking bullet when running (yellow), blue when done,
  red on error; output preview with ⎿ prefix and 5-line collapse
- User prompt styled with ❯ blue prefix and white bold text
- Process viewer (Ctrl+B): overlay listing active bash processes with
  elapsed time, K to kill, Esc to close
- Bash tool refactored with spawn + kill_on_drop + shared BashKillSignal
  for external termination from TUI
- Running tools show real-time elapsed and ctrl+b hint for bash

commit.message:
feat: 完成 Epic 10 成就与游戏化系统

后端:
- 数据库迁移: achievements, user_achievements, point_transactions, user_points 表
  + 预置 9 个成就: 首次探索、话痨、社区明星、常客、老玩家、音乐鉴赏家等
- domain/achievement: Achievement、UserAchievement、PointTransaction、UserPoints、LeaderboardEntry 实体
- infra/postgres/achievement_repo.go: 完整的成就和积分 CRUD 实现
- infra/redis/leaderboard.go: 基于 Redis Sorted Set 的总榜/周榜排行榜
- usecase/achievement_service.go: 成就解锁(自动/手动)、积分增减、排行榜查询
- handler/achievement_handler.go: 8 个 API 端点
- 路由: /achievements, /leaderboard, /leaderboard/weekly, /users/me/achievements,
         /users/me/points, /admin/users/:id/achievements, /admin/users/:id/points

前端:
- app/achievements/page.tsx: 按稀有度分组展示所有成就
- app/leaderboard/page.tsx: 总榜 + 周榜 Tab, 金银铜奖章展示, 积分说明
- app/profile/page.tsx: 新增成就 Tab 展示已解锁成就, 积分看板(余额/累计/成就数)

commit.message:
#1043 Integrate Terraform quality gate and CI (#1044)

## Issue

Closes #1043

## 概要

Terraform ファイルの品質検証（fmt, validate, tflint）をローカルの品質ゲートと CI に統合する。

### 変更内容

- `.mise.toml` に terraform 1.14、tflint 0.61 を追加
- `infra/terraform/.tflint.hcl` を作成（AWS プラグイン v0.45.0）
- `just lint-terraform` / `just fmt-terraform` レシピを追加し、`just check` に統合
- `lefthook.yaml` の pre-commit に `terraform-fmt-check` を追加
- `ci.yaml` に `terraform` ジョブを追加（`hashicorp/setup-terraform` +
`terraform-linters/setup-tflint`）
- GitHub Actions 許可リストに
`hashicorp/setup-terraform@*`、`terraform-linters/setup-tflint@*` を追加
- `docs/80_ナレッジベース/devtools/Terraform.md` を作成
- `.claude/rules/terraform.md` の手動検証記述を更新

## 品質確認

- 設計・ドキュメント: `docs/80_ナレッジベース/devtools/Terraform.md`
新規作成、`docs/80_ナレッジベース/devtools/GitHubActions.md`
許可設定追加、`.claude/rules/terraform.md` 更新、セッションログ
`prompts/runs/2026-03/2026-03-05_2200_Terraform品質ゲートとCI統合.md`、ADR該当なし
- Issue との整合: 完了基準すべて達成（CI terraform ジョブ実行確認済み、fmt/validate 検出確認済み）
- テスト: N/A（テストコード変更なし。手動検証で `just lint-terraform` 成功、CI terraform ジョブ
pass 確認）
- コード品質（マイナス→ゼロ）: 既存パターン準拠（ci.yaml の changes+条件付きジョブ構造、lefthook の
glob+run パターン、justfile のレシピ形式）
- 品質向上（ゼロ→プラス）: `lint-terraform` は未 init 環境で validate
をスキップする条件分岐を実装。不要な初期化を強制しない
- UI/UX: N/A（インフラ・ツールチェーンのみ）
- 横断検証: N/A（単一コミット）
- `just check` + CI pass: `just check-pre-push` pass、CI
Terraform/Shell/CI Success pass

## 確認項目

- [x] `just check` + CI が通る
- [x] `.tf` ファイルを変更した PR で CI の Terraform 検証ジョブが実行される
- [x] `terraform fmt` 違反が品質ゲートで検出される
- [x] `terraform validate` 失敗が品質ゲートで検出される

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Code (v2.1.69, Opus 4.6) <noreply@anthropic.com>
